text:
Beneficiary Race Code
(modified using RTI algorithm) 0 - Unknown
1 - Non-Hispanic White
2 - Black (or African American)
3 - Other
4- Asian/Pacific Islander
5 - Hispanic
6 - American Indian/Alaskan Native
Null/missing - unknown or no Medicare enrollment data
D_MEDICAID_RACE Medicaid Race/Ethnicity Code 0 - unknown
1 - White
2 - Black (or African American)
3 - American Indian/Alaskan Native
4 - Asian
5 - Hispanic
6 - Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander
7 - Hispanic and one or more races
8 - more
